query:
SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND TABLE_NAME IN ('project_changelog','project_issues','project_phases','project_tasks','projects')
  AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('costImpact','scheduleImpact','createdAt','updatedAt','relatedTaskId','category','risk','type')
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2UraMdNSh7w9Y5V.f955b98aaba5 --database KRSmEkFUnyCLf45UNPETAr --execute 
SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND TABLE_NAME IN ('project_changelog','project_issues','project_phases','project_tasks','projects')
  AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('costImpact','scheduleImpact','createdAt','updatedAt','relatedTaskId','category','risk','type')
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME
stdout:
TABLE_NAME	COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE	CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH
project_changelog	costImpact	varchar(256)	256
project_changelog	createdAt	datetime	NULL
project_changelog	scheduleImpact	varchar(256)	256
project_changelog	type	enum('decision','tradeoff','eco','ecn','ecr','spec','cost','schedule','supplier','other')	8
project_changelog	updatedAt	datetime	NULL
project_issues	category	enum('hardware','software','mechanical','thermal','reliability','safety','performance','other')	11
project_issues	createdAt	datetime	NULL
project_issues	relatedTaskId	varchar(64)	64
project_issues	updatedAt	datetime	NULL
project_phases	createdAt	datetime	NULL
project_phases	updatedAt	datetime	NULL
project_tasks	createdAt	datetime	NULL
project_tasks	updatedAt	datetime	NULL
projects	category	varchar(16)	16
projects	createdAt	timestamp	NULL
projects	risk	varchar(16)	16
projects	updatedAt	timestamp	NULL
